creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 231601
update to 0.4.6.10

Update security/tor to 0.4.6.10 which was released on 2022-02-04

Note that building the documentation somehow fails on FreeBSD 12.X because a2x errors out, I have excluded the MANPAGES and DOCS options for now there as a workaround.
